data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having different daily and weekly rates, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of these rates. The linked use case mentions a weekly rate discount of 20%, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system differentiates between daily and weekly rates in practice. This lack of validation leads to a clear gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of validation for different daily vs weekly rates.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for daily and weekly rates
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system correctly applies different rates for daily and weekly bookings.
